html:
Exclusive to:

The Naked Mole Bat Burrow is a naturally spawning object that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together, appearing in the Lunar Grotto. It is made by Naked Mole Bats when they go to sleep.

It can be dug with a Shovel to drop 2 items among:

Item Chance
42.6%
42.6%
6.4%
4.3%
2.1%
1.3%
0.9%

Trivia

  • The Naked Mole Bat Burrow was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Naked Mole Bat Burrow
Source
Can be Dug
Lunar Grotto
Spawns
Resources
Miscellaneous
"molebathill"
“I wonder what might be stuck in that rat's nest.”
–Wilson
“Ew, is it sleeping in its own snot?”
–Willow
“Is mushy, stinky home.”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail keeps daring me to touch it...”
–Wendy
“A DISGUSTING HOME FOR DISGUSTING VERMIN”
–WX-78
“The burrow appears to be mainly comprised of phlegm and mud.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks cozy enough.”
–Woodie
“Do I even want anything I find in there, knowing its spent time in a rodent's nostrils?”
–Maxwell
“Yöur mucöusy defenses will nöt deter me, mörsel!”
–Wigfrid
“Yuck, did that all come from its nose?”
–Webber
“Mon dieu, to think it can sleep in that mess!”
–Warly
“Sleeping”
–Wormwood
“Might be some good materials stuck in that gunk.”
–Winona
“This snotty collection needs further inspection.”
–Wortox
“Maybe there treasures inside!”
–Wurt
“There might be something interesting in there.”
–Walter
“What a horrid place to call home.”
–Wanda
The Naked Mole Bat Burrow is a naturally spawning object that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together, appearing in the Lunar Grotto. It is made by Naked Mole Bats when they go to sleep.
It can be dug with a Shovel to drop 2 items among:

The '''Naked Mole Bat Burrow''' is a naturally spawning object that is exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', appearing in the [[Lunar Grotto]]. It is made by [[Naked Mole Bat]]s when they go to sleep.

It can be dug with a [[Shovel]] to drop 2 items among:
{| class="wikitable" cellspacing="1" cellpadding="1" border="0"
|-
! scope="col" |Item
! scope="col" |Chance
|-
|{{pic24|Cut Grass}} || 42.6%
|-
| {{pic24|Twigs}} || 42.6%
|-
| {{pic24|Guano}} || 6.4%
|-
| {{pic24|Moon Shroom}} || 4.3%
|-
| {{pic24|Light Bulb}} || 2.1% 
|-
| {{pic24|Leafy Meat}} || 1.3%
|-
|{{pic24|Oblong Seeds}} || 0.9%
|}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* The Naked Mole Bat Burrow was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update.
